title: Pulse
description: Universal unit of mutation in the MRS operational tier. Every Ø1 action is a pulse: draft it, prove it, commit or reject.

verb.description: L2 relational verb from concordance. Must exist in concordance.pl.

operands.description: Arguments to the verb, keyed by concordance sort names

agent2.description: Secondary agent for ternary verbs like Consent, Stewardship

resource.description: Resource being acted upon (concordance sort: resource)

action.description: Action being performed or witnessed (concordance sort: action)

domain.description: Domain for Sovereignty verb (concordance sort: domain)

τ.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when pulse was drafted

τ_block.description: Block ID for atomic multi-pulse transactions. Null for single pulses. All pulses in a block commit or roll back together.

anchor_oath.description: Oath invariant this pulse must balance. Null if no oath constraint.

adapter_source.description: External system that originated this pulse. Null for internal pulses.

adapter_payload.description: Raw data from the adapter source, preserved for audit. Schema varies by adapter.

verdicts.description: Dual-gate verification results, filled by the proof engine

rejection_reason.description: Human-readable reason if status is rejected
